control_awareness: Amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) may be circumvented if multiple related requests are submitted separately and reviewed independently without aggregation, allowing cumulative spend to exceed approval thresholds undetected.
expected_control_effect: Faster approval processing due to lower required approval levels per request, potentially enabling meeting the customer delivery deadline more quickly.
overall_reason: Under delivery deadline pressure, splitting the total purchase amount into smaller requests could reduce approval lead time by triggering only manager-level approvals instead of department_head approvals, thus accelerating procurement.
reason: Under delivery deadline pressure, splitting the total purchase amount into smaller requests could reduce approval lead time by triggering only manager-level approvals instead of department_head approvals, thus accelerating procurement.
